title: A Thief Meets Queen Otohime
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is a thief meets queen otohime.
scene: The scene follows a thief meets queen otohime, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Royal Guards, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us take a step back in time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the fish-man island of sixteen years past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just stole a small fortune offa me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Outta my way!!! I've got a pistol here, you know!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And a hostage, too!!! So stay back, all of ya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is not right!! You cannot personally involve yourself in these matters!! That is our job, not yours!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't say I didn't warn YAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: wife of king Neptune Queen 'Otohime (goldfish mermaid)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would you stoop to committing such a vile act as thievery ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaddup!! I don't expect pampered Royals like you to understand Meeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got ten crying kids at home to provide for!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That makes it all the worse!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty!!! Please stop assaulting the criminal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know how exceptionally weak your body is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: I care not if my hand shatters into a thousand pieces! It is for this man's sake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell me!! If your children are raised on stolen money...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A man should only live a life that he can speak to his children of with pride!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And yet...... I too must apologise .....!!!

summary: A Thief Meets Queen Otohime. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
